programme.title: Sports Adventure Ep508: Life-On-The-Road with Longboard Surf Star Kassia Meador
programme.desc: Sports Adventure goes behind-the-scenes and explores life-on-the-road with longboard surf star Kassia Meador as she tames the waves and competes on the global professional surf circuit.

programme.title: Facing Waves Ep404: Stand-Up Paddling the Azores
programme.desc: Mild weather and warm waters welcome Host Nikki Gregg as she stand-up paddles along the amazing coastlines that draw paddlers and adventurers to the Azores. She also visits crystal clear volcanic lakes, world-class surf spots and stunning coastal communities.

programme.title: Water Matters Ep104: Drinking Water + The Human Connection
programme.desc: Water Matters documents water-related environmental issues from around the globe as a number of the world’s best documentary filmmakers and environmental organizations share their stories regarding the planet’s water crisis as well as potential solutions for a healthier world.

programme.title: Blue World Ep404: Shipwrecks Turned Into Artificial Reefs + Freediving
programme.desc: Blue World visits shipwrecks in Florida to see how they turn into artificial reefs. Then Blue World’s host learns to freedive with Karol Meyer…a world-record freediver.

programme.title: The Bassquatch Hunter: Kayak Salmon Fishing vs BBQ
programme.desc: Mike takes a good friend, and Professional firearms instructor/writer/photographer, out salmon fishing and then they head to check out Andy's hobby of competitive BBQ! Don't miss what these two cook up in this episode!

programme.title: Xplash Ep102
programme.desc: Xplash brings you the coolest action in, on, and near water. Today you’ll meet World Champions and kayaking royalty…the Jackson family, visit China for a slippery run over an ice city, and our first stop is to the Oregon Coast for the biggest waves you've never heard of.

programme.title: The Blue Realm Ep109: Toxic Invaders
programme.desc: They’re beautiful - and deadly, with venomous spines that resemble a lion's mane. They’re lionfish, a tropical reef species normally found in the Indo-Pacific. Now, they’re wreaking havoc in the Caribbean and Atlantic – all thought to have descended from a handful of aquarium fish carelessly released into the sea. In these regions, they're potentially a greater threat to coral reefs and commercial fish populations than global warming or pollution.

programme.title: Sports Adventure Ep508: Life-On-The-Road with Longboard Surf Star Kassia Meador
programme.desc: Sports Adventure goes behind-the-scenes and explores life-on-the-road with longboard surf star Kassia Meador as she tames the waves and competes on the global professional surf circuit.

programme.title: Facing Waves Ep404: Stand-Up Paddling the Azores
programme.desc: Mild weather and warm waters welcome Host Nikki Gregg as she stand-up paddles along the amazing coastlines that draw paddlers and adventurers to the Azores. She also visits crystal clear volcanic lakes, world-class surf spots and stunning coastal communities.

programme.title: Water Matters Ep104: Drinking Water + The Human Connection
programme.desc: Water Matters documents water-related environmental issues from around the globe as a number of the world’s best documentary filmmakers and environmental organizations share their stories regarding the planet’s water crisis as well as potential solutions for a healthier world.

programme.title: Billabong Presents: The Cape
programme.desc: What happens when good winds, good weather, and a solid swell come together along one of the rawest stretches of coastline on the planet? You don't stop. Surfers Taj Burrow, Shaun Manners, Jaleesa Vincent, and Matt Bromley test their staying power on this Adventure Division strike mission.

programme.title: Volcom Presents: The Backyard
programme.desc: At Pipeline there is flora, fauna, ocean and stone. Volcom Stone. At this point, the Volcom house is practically part of the reef. Between the team, the family, the legacy, the peanut gallery, the respect, the Pipe Pro and the barbecues, you’d be hard pressed not to notice Volcom on the North Shore.

programme.title: Volcom Presents: XO - Coco Ho
programme.desc: Step into the world of pro surfer Coco Ho. Raised on Oahu’s North Shore, the film explores how Ho got started in the water, her surfing family history, and the ups and downs of the Championship Tour. Featuring brother Mason Ho, father Michael Ho, and surfers John John Florence and Stephanie Gilmore.

programme.title: Kaiwi Winds
programme.desc: [object Object]

programme.title: Volcom Presents: Tweakin' On Boards With Ryan Burch
programme.desc: Tweakin’ on Boards was shot in 2009. Seems like a second ago and forever ago. Truth is it’s both. As a surfer and filmmaker, Burch isn’t content complaining everything's already been done. Says fellow surfer Cyrus Sutton, “He needs to FEEL history for himself.” This film is that and more.

programme.title: Absinthe Films Presents: Neverland
programme.desc: Neverland is a state of mind, a mountain pushed up from the ground by imagination. Anyone can go but most people have trouble with the simple directions: Follow your dreams.

programme.title: Sparks
programme.desc: Take a pow trip around the world and into the mind of Wolle Nyvelt to find out why his passion for snowboarding runs so deep. From his legendary tenure as a rider to his work shaping pow surfers with Asmo, Wolle has dedicated his life to the culture of sliding sideways. "Sparks is the exploration into what makes snowboarding so fun and exciting to us all. It’s an interpretation of our lifestyle; the culture of building boards, riding mountains, and the adventure of choosing this path.” - Wolle Nyvelt

programme.title: Äsmosphere
programme.desc: Äsmosphere is the surf-influenced creation of Wolfgang Nyvelt showcasing his craftsmanship and appreciation for the glide and the turns we take on snow. After 16 years of filming legendary video parts, freeriding is now at the forefront of Wolle’s mind.

programme.title: Inaka
programme.desc: ‘Inaka’ is a short film about Iwanai, ‘the hidden beauty’ of Hokkaido. Snowboarders Wolfgang Nyvelt, Garrett Warnick and Bode Merrill drop everything and head to the North Island of Japan in search of good times and backcountry powder. Filmed by Billabong ambassador and filmmaker Chris Burkard.

programme.title: Absinthe Films Presents: Optimistic?
programme.desc: For those who live to snowboard, climate change can present an impossible challenge or become a catalyst for creativity. It all depends on how you look at it. In the movie Optimistic?, Absinthe Films follows 15 riders as they each explore the effects of global warming. Timely. Innovative. Positive.

programme.title: Hillside Project - Prototyping in Mayrhofen
programme.desc: This past year, Louif Paradis and Harrison Gordon visited Wolle’s hometown of Mayrhofen to better understand the complex prototyping process and to see where Wolle carved his teeth as a snowboarder and a shaper. Filmed by David Vladyka Riding: Wolle Nyvelt Harrison Gordon Louif Paradis Victor Daviet

programme.title: Hillside Project - Rizumu
programme.desc: An intergenerational exploration of Japan in search of rhythm, flow, and incredibly deep snow. Each year Wolle Nyvelt and a select crew of snowboarders set out to explore new terrain and test different shapes within the Hillside Project Series. After being closed to travel for the last couple of years, Japan was the obvious choice. Needless to say, the crew composed of Wolle, Takaharu Nakai, Louif Paradis and Luke Lund scored. Featuring: Wolle Nyvelt, Takaharu Nakai, Louif Paradis, Luke Lund Filmed by David Vladyka

programme.title: Hillside Project - Äsmo Factory
programme.desc: Making boards at the Äsmo factory! Featuring Josh Dirksen, Max Buri and Wolfgang Nyvelt

programme.title: Jack of All Tastes
programme.desc: Jack of All Tastes is hosted by Jackie Long and powered by famous athletes and unique eateries. Follow Jackie as he journeys from city to city and dines with NFL athletes and their significant others.

programme.title: South Beach Classics
programme.desc: Need a classic car? If you're in Miami, where old-time autos fit in perfectly with the city's glitz and glamour, Ted Vernon is the man to see. The no-nonsense, gregarious Long Islander runs Florida's largest classic car dealership, where he buys, sells, trades and exchanges unique cars from a lot that houses more than 300 of them. His outgoing personality meshes seamlessly with the colourful collectibles he moves each day, helped by an eclectic shop crew affectionately dubbed `the gargoyles'.

programme.title: Journey To Giglio
programme.desc: On January of 2012 the Italian cruise ship Costa Concordia sank in shallow waters after striking an underwater rock off Isola del Giglio. Many things remained unclear about this tragedy, so Andi van Zyl is set to discover the truth regarding this incident.Journey to Giglio is an investigative piece on the infamous Costa Concordia tragedy. Andi van Zyl is on the Italian island of Giglio for an exclusive exposé on the shipwreck that shocked the world. She will leave no rock unturned as she digs into what happened the night of the accident and uncovers the disaster’s impact on the local residents and economy.Highlights include exploration of the island and disaster site, and an interview with the man at the helm of the salvage operation, Nick Sloane. Andi sits down with the fellow South African to discuss the delicate process of freeing the wrecked cruise-liner from the reef without spoiling the pristine waters of Giglio Island.Find out the mystery behind the sinking of Costa Concordia on this Journey to Giglio.

programme.title: Eurosaf Championship Tavira
programme.desc: The EUROSAF (European Sailing Federation) Championship will take place in the waters off the Portuguese town of Tavira. The 19 sailing champions of Europe will be crowned in this gathering that has over 150 sailors and more than 100 boats and boards compete against triumph. 14 European countries have sent their best sailors to compete in eight different disciplines, including single-handed and double-handed dinghies, plus sailboards and high performance dinghy. They will compete over the 5-day competition to choose the youth champion of Europe in each of these disciplines. Follow the competition of the future talent of the sailing world as they sail across the waters of Tavira, on Nautical Channel.

programme.title: Speed Catamarans GC32 - Episode 6
programme.desc: For its sixth season, the ultra-high performance one design catamarans, once again visited five top venues across the world. Each location selected particularly for its ideal weather conditions - stable winds and flat waters - perfect for the nimble GC32s to fly across the water at speeds of over 30 knots. Earlier in 2019, intensive discussions and decisions took place within the teams with many deciding to focus their efforts for the upcoming season, on the GC32 Racing Tour. This season the tour welcomed some new teams as well as many familiar regular GC32 crews. In total 12 teams from 9 different counties came together to take part in the 6th GC32 Racing Tour. Amongst them, some of the most well-known professional sailors in the world.

programme.desc: Thought only to exist in legend, Edison's device for contacting the dead is found...and stolen. A group of professional thieves go on a global crime spree reanimating the dead in order to steal treasures thought long lost. Things begin to go wrong when they cannot control the creatures, and the machine begins to develop a mind of its own.

programme.title: Death of A Ghost Hunter
programme.desc: Based on true events, a ghost hunter Carter Simms is paid to conduct a paranormal investigation of a suspected haunted house. Along with a cameraman, a reporter, and a spiritual advocate, she embarks on a three night journey into terror.

programme.title: Wardens - S06:E13 - Back Country Patrol
programme.desc: Wardens do way more than just drive around in trucks and check licenses. This week the Region One wardens go off the grid to protect the natural resources of Montana U.S.A.

programme.title: Wardens - S06:E14 - Double Kill
programme.desc: Montana U.S.A. Region 5 has a rash of illegal elk kills and it's down to the Wardens to investigate them.

programme.title: Close Quarter Battle - S01:E05 - Delta Prison Rescue Operation
programme.desc: In 1989, CIA operative Kurt Muse was imprisoned at the notorious Carcel Modelo in Panama for his role in organizing radio transmissions against dictator Manuel Noriega. That December, an elite group of the US Delta Force breached the roof of the prison, and one of the most daring close quarter battle operations in history began. From the dramatic helicopter crash and wounding of several Delta operators to the extraction of the entire team by the 5th Infantry Division, this is prime material for CQB analysis. In this episode, CQB recreates the raid, focusing on the “sub-second” reflexes of the Delta Force team from the moment they entered the prison to their extraction from the roof of the prison by an MH-6 “Little Bird” helicopter.

programme.title: Close Quarter Battle - S01:E06 - Snipers and Scout
programme.desc: Joint Task Force Two (JTF 2) is the elite Canadian Forces Special Operations unit responsible for a broad range of missions, including counter-terrorism and armed assistance to other government departments. Highly secretive, JTF 2 and its predecessor, the Canadian Airborne Regiment, have been deployed in hotspots around the world from Haiti to Bosnia. This episode focuses on the legendary JTF sniper teams and their use in Afghanistan alongside the British SAS and the US Delta Force at “the sharp end of the spear.” A book written by an ex-JTF member explains how, in 2006, both the Pentagon and the British Foreign Office noted the instrumental role that JTF 2 played in the rescue of the British and Canadian Christian Peacemaker Team held hostage in Iraq. Unique in look, the FN P90 personal defense weapon, used by JTF 2 soldiers and special police around the world, will be highlighted in this program.

programme.title: Wildlife Heroes - S01:E01 - American Icons

programme.desc: Two young men who have had to cope with extraordinarily challenging events and circumstances as, together, they have gone on to change the face of the British royal family and carve meaningful roles for themselves in the modern world. Made in 1999 two years after the death of their mother, Princess Diana, this original and touching documentary examines the lives of the royal princes, the legacy of their mother, the responsibilities of being a royal - and what the future holds for them.

programme.title: Delivered Daily
programme.desc: “God, can You get me out of this?” It’s a prayer we’ve all prayed. But what if God’s answer isn’t escape, but endurance? What if His rescue comes one day at a time? This message will help you recognize God’s faithful provision in every season and learn how to trust His hand as He leads you through.

programme.title: Same Lies New Loops
programme.desc: The enemy loves to trap you in the same old lies: “It’s not enough” and “You’re not loved.” But God’s truth breaks the cycle. When you change what you say, you change what you see, and His presence opens a new loop of peace and hope.

programme.title: He Answered
programme.desc: Pastor Steven gives us three things to remember when life is hard. The enemy wants to keep us circling the wilderness, but God will bring us through as we learn to repeat what leads us to victory.

programme.title: Not Here
programme.desc: Do you ever feel like your prayers are going unanswered? The enemy wants you to believe God’s not listening, but the truth is He hears you. His presence is with you in the mountains and the valleys, and He’s working one moment at a time.

programme.title: Keep It In Context
programme.desc: When you feel surrounded by pressure and fear, it’s easy to lose perspective. But what if God’s already provided the help you’ve been praying for? Keep it in context: the battle isn’t proof you’re losing, it’s evidence that you’re carrying something worth fighting for.

programme.title: Your Label Is Lying
programme.desc: This sermon is for someone who has been hearing the same lies from the enemy for so long that you’ve started to believe them. But you are not your issue. You are not your bad decision. It’s time to interrupt your story with truth and leave the lies behind, because the Word says otherwise.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Fernando threatens Jeli with taking the child, but Leandro warns him that he is his father. Fausto waits for his son Gregorio, beats him, throws him out of the house and decides to take all his belongings and benefits. Ezequiel chooses to lock up Julia; Gregorio comes to take his wife, Celso finds them, enraged and drugged, and attacks them, wounding the young woman.

programme.title: La Trepadora
programme.desc: Adelaida de Guanipa asks her daughter Victoria to leave her alone with her husband, who challenges her to decide if she is going to let her desire to take revenge on Carlos Hansen end up confronting him with her daughter to give the girl more reasons to hate him; Hilario orders his foreman Moncho to see to it that the businessman returns to the capital immediately. Sure that she is doing the right thing, Fernanda de Alcoy goes to Marisa's house to offer her money in exchange for her leaving the hacienda and forgetting forever about her husband Leopoldo, who, according to her, never wants to see her again; the humble woman, very dignified, rejects the blackmail of the lady. Late at night, Victoria is surprised when Nicolás Del Casal shows up at her house looking for Adelaida to give her a message from her aunt Fernanda; when he manages to see her alone, Nicolás reveals to Mrs. Guanipa that the order is not from her aunt but from Carlos Hansen, who sent her a letter through him; Adelaida thanks the young man for his discretion in this regard. Florencia believes that Victoria's bet with Nicolás is to prove to him that she is superior to him; Fernanda, on the contrary, considers that everything that the young Guanipa does is to continue seeing her beloved; Mrs. Alcoy proposes to her niece-in-law to find a way to get rid of Victoria forever.

programme.title: La Trepadora
programme.desc: After remembering the moment in which Rosendo Zapata tried to get on top of her, Victoria Guanipa reveals to Nicolás Del Casal that, just like him, she also once dreamed of the same bull they have just encountered and that it was after that that she had an experience that made her feel in danger. Embarrassment invades Felipe Osuna again when he cannot respond sexually to his wife Antonieta as it has happened since they got married; the girl asks if it is because of this "problem" that he has been avoiding being alone with her; Felipe gets upset with the young woman for suggesting such a thing. Due to the heavy rain; Nicolás and Victoria find themselves in the need to take refuge in an abandoned shed in Cantarrana; place where the young Guanipa takes the opportunity to ask her beloved why he did not insist on reconciling with her and ended up marrying Florencia; he just tells her that it is too late to wonder why things happened and that there is no turning back.

programme.title: Corazon Traicionado
programme.desc: Lorena meets Alberto in a café and he takes the opportunity to inform her that his relationship with Patricia is over. Lorena already knew, she summons him to tell him that Norma found the gun with which Gertrudis killed Paco and Marco Aurelio - Virginia's psychiatrist will issue a favorable report, he considers that she is fit to raise her son - Omar discovers Lorena meeting with Alberto and jealousy takes over him.

programme.title: Corazon Traicionado
programme.desc: Alberto has a close moment with Norma, Lorena has already told him everything and he wants to know the details. Norma tells him everything she knows and the desire she has to go far away because of the terror she is living. He promises her that nothing will happen to her, that he will protect her; Gertrudis finds them together and is shocked.

programme.title: El Desprecio
programme.desc: Clara and Raúl are explaining to Rafael that things cannot be as he wishes. Gabriel arrives to pick up Clara for an important trip.

programme.title: El Desprecio
programme.desc: Bernice stares at a razor, if Israel does not allow her to be happy with the man she loves, she is not interested in living.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: La Madre Isabel defiende a Camila de la acusación de Roberto y confronta a Camila. Max, al encontrarla muy triste, le pide que confíe en él. Julia y Gregorio con un plan para que sus padres piensen que no volverán a verse y dejen de seguirlos.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Camila se defiende fieramente de la agresión de Roberto y le cuenta a Max lo sucedido. La Madre Isabel, para ayudar a Camila, le confía a Ezequiel el motivo por el que Roberto la extorsiona. Max presiona a Camila para que le cuente toda la verdad.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Roberto confiesa que fue él quien asesinó a Gabriel para inculpar a Camila. Camila, llora de alegría, al saberse inocente de esa muerte. Max le reitera su incondicional apoyo ratificándole su gran amor. Ezequiel expresa su intención de casarse con Camila

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Ezequiel rechazado por Camila, la manipula con una nueva oferta de trabajo como asistente de su hija Julia y todo para tratar de conseguir su cercanía. Max, confía en el amor de Camila. Torrealba pide que unan esfuerzos para encontrar a Rosa Blanco.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Ante las intenciones de Ezequiel, Octavia y Marcelina agreden verbalmente a Camila. Max le propone y Camila duda pero accede a casarse con él. En una cena, Ezequiel reúne a sus hijos y Camila será la homenajeada especial.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: En la cena, el tema principal será Rosa Blanco. Ezequiel dice que esa mujer fue una oportunista que enamoró y se aprovechó de su hermano menor, Leoncio. Astrid ofende agregando que fue una prostituta, culpable de la guerra entre las dos familias por su relación con Augusto Aragón y también con Leoncio López.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Camila insiste en saber sobre su relación familiar, piensa que pueda ser prima de Max. Ezequiel quiere despejar la duda de que podría ser su sobrina, interroga a la Madre Isabel que niega saberlo y también recurre a Marcelina que se lo confirma. Camila, protege a Chantal, una niña que vende flores.

programme.title: El Retorno
programme.desc: Una extraña mujer mantiene expectante y desorientado al espectador cuando a diario habla con su hija y la presencia de su hija no aparece en ningún momento.

programme.title: 48 Horas de Terror
programme.desc: Mateo un escritor citadino adquiere una casa de campo en donde planea vivir con su esposa y escribir en la tranquilidad del campo, pero no tomo en cuenta las trágicas noticias de los acontecimientos de canibalismo que ocurrieron a manos de sus vecinos quienes solo buscan sacias su hambre.

programme.title: The Juniors y La Formula Imperial
programme.desc: Narra las vidas de 7 adolescentes millonarios que se aventuran a planificar una revolución social, generada por vídeo-escándalos y experimentos médicos, con el objetivo de generar un cambio en la ideología mundial, el conflicto entre las clases sociales y el enfrentamiento con sus muchachas de servicio doméstico.

programme.title: El Secuestro
programme.desc: Un joven con talento en la música sueña con ser un gran artista hasta que conoce al hijo de un poderoso narcotraficante colombiano quién promete ayudarlo a cambio de que trabaje para ellos. El joven no se imagina en que mundo se está metiendo. La fama le costará lo que más ama.

programme.title: El Duende
programme.desc: Rosalía se muda a la ciudad junto a su hijo pequeño, Ramiro. Con la ayuda de una conocida, consigue encontrar vivienda. La casa ha estado cerrada por décadas, y tiene un horno antiguo. Lo que Rosalía ignora es que dentro del horno habita un duende que tiene por costumbre robar niños.

programme.title: 4 Metros
programme.desc: 4 METROS relata, en tono de comedia romántica, la historia de un hombre entrando en la crisis de los 40. Joaquín tiene un zumbido en los oídos y poco sabe de sí mismo. Se ha dejado llevar sin intervenir demasiado en sus deseos. No escucha su voz interior. Su vida afectiva y laboral no tienen rumbo. El zumbido quizá sea la expresión, no asumida ni entendida todavía, de un ruido metafórico de la vida gritándole por dónde ir. Su novia tiene 20 años menos, aparece la presión social y familiar sobre la paternidad, sentirse útil, la vocación, el trabajo y cómo ser feliz. Hasta que otra mujer irrumpe y todo parece acomodarse. Pero siempre el orden debe ser interno. Así, como si el destino tomara la palabra, su vida cambiará 4 metros abajo del agua, donde aparece un sendero para encontrar la identidad.

programme.title: El Secuestro

programme.title: A Bucket of Blood
programme.desc: Un camarero de un café beatnik se convierte en un artista asesino para alimentar su nueva fama.

programme.title: Abilene Town
programme.desc: Un sheriff intenta detener los conflictos entre colonos en el Oeste tras la Guerra Civil.

programme.title: Detour
programme.desc: El viaje de un autoestopista hacia California se convierte en una pesadilla de muerte, chantaje y encuentros fatales con una despiadada femme fatale.

programme.title: The Man with the Golden Arm
programme.desc: Un exadicto a la heroína intenta reconstruir su vida como baterista de jazz, pero el crimen, la manipulación y la tentación amenazan con arrastrarlo de nuevo a su oscuro pasado.
